{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Overlord dreadbeast
| species = Dreadbeast
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Overlord dreadbeast]] has a humanoid figure with long, twisted limbs and pale, rotting skin.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Overlord dreadbeast]] is a fat, rotting, man-like creature that spews red flames.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Dreadbeasts]]
